allow: PowerShell($v = "D:\\Coding\\GrowMate 2\\public\\vendor"; curl.exe -sL -o "$v\\tf.min.js" "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tensorflow/tfjs/dist/tf.min.js"; curl.exe -sL -o "$v\\tflite\\tf-tflite.min.js" "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tensorflow/tfjs-tflite/dist/tf-tflite.min.js"; foreach \($f in @\("tflite_web_api_cc.js","tflite_web_api_cc.wasm","tflite_web_api_cc_simd.js","tflite_web_api_cc_simd.wasm","tflite_web_api_cc_threaded_simd.js","tflite_web_api_cc_threaded_simd.wasm","tflite_web_api_cc_threaded_simd.worker.js"\)\) { curl.exe -sL -o "$v\\tflite\\$f" "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tensorflow/tfjs-tflite/dist/$f" }; Get-ChildItem $v -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{N='Name';E={$_.FullName.Replace\($v,''\)}}, Length)
